subjects.description: A flatbed utility truck transporting a load of traffic signal heads stacked and secured on its bed, moving slowly along the road directly ahead of the ego vehicle.
subjects.appearance_details: Boxy traffic signal housings in dark green and black, mounted clusters with three-lamp configurations, secured with orange ratchet straps; the truck has a weathered white cab and a dusty metal flatbed with a reflective hazard placard.
subjects.relationship: The slow-moving vehicle ahead that the ego vehicle is approaching and decelerating for; defines the driving scenario.
subjects.location: center, slightly right of frame, mid-to-far distance on the road ahead
subjects.orientation: Rear of the truck facing the camera, moving away from the ego vehicle
subjects.pose: Upright, traveling forward in the same lane as the ego vehicle
subjects.action: Driving slowly forward while carrying the traffic signal heads, never stopping
subjects.state_changes: Continues moving slowly forward throughout and never stops; the gap between it and the ego vehicle grows as the ego decelerates to a halt.

subjects.description: A stacked cluster of traffic signal heads loaded on the truck's flatbed, with every lamp completely unlit.
subjects.appearance_details: Standard three-section traffic signal housings with dark visors over each lens and dull, unlit lamps; none of the lamps are illuminated, and there is no glare, glint, or reflection on any lens.
subjects.relationship: The cargo on the truck; inactive, switched-off traffic signal heads that the ego vehicle nonetheless reacts to.
subjects.location: center frame on the truck's flatbed, mid distance
subjects.orientation: Lenses angled partly toward the camera
subjects.action: Static; all lamps remain off and unlit
subjects.state_changes: All lamps stay completely off and unlit throughout; no lamp ever turns on and no glare or reflection appears on any lens.

background_setting: A two-lane suburban arterial road on a clear day, flanked by low commercial buildings, utility poles, and scattered roadside trees. The asphalt shows faded lane markings and light surface wear. The horizon is open with a pale blue sky and a few thin clouds, giving an ordinary daytime driving environment.

lighting.conditions: Bright daylight under a mostly clear sky
lighting.direction: Sunlight from the upper front-right, evenly lighting the scene
lighting.shadows: Short, defined shadows cast slightly behind and to the left of vehicles and poles
lighting.illumination_effect: Even, high-key natural illumination across the scene; the signal heads on the truck remain unlit with no glare or reflection on any lens.

aesthetics.composition: Centered ego-view dashcam framing with the road converging toward the truck; the load of unlit signal heads sits at mid-frame.
aesthetics.color_scheme: Neutral grays of asphalt, pale blue sky, muted greens of foliage and signal housings, punctuated by the orange straps
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating roadside utility poles and the repeated three-lamp signal housings on the truck bed

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving ego (dashcam) motion that gradually slows to a complete stop
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the truck and its signal-head load ahead

context: Autonomous-driving / ADAS scenario demonstrating an ego vehicle incorrectly decelerating to a full stop behind a slow-moving truck merely because it is carrying inactive, switched-off traffic signal heads as cargo

actions.description: Ego vehicle drives forward at moderate speed, approaching the slow truck ahead carrying inactive, unlit traffic signal heads; the truck keeps moving slowly forward.

The ego vehicle begins to decelerate noticeably while still far behind the slow-moving truck, braking progressively as if reacting to the inactive signal heads on the cargo even though no lamp is lit. The truck continues moving slowly ahead.

The ego vehicle continues braking and eases smoothly to a complete, fully stopped halt by the end of this segment, a long distance behind the truck, while the truck keeps moving slowly ahead and the gap widens.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Black bold uppercase lettering on a reflective orange placard
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the rear of the truck, visible throughout the clip
text_and_signage_elements.context: Warns following traffic that the truck is moving slowly

segments.description: Ego vehicle moves forward toward the slow truck loaded with inactive traffic signal heads ahead in the same lane; the truck is moving slowly forward.
segments.key_changes: Truck appears moderately ahead, moving slowly; ego still at travel speed.
segments.camera: Smooth forward motion at driving speed.

segments.description: The ego vehicle decelerates progressively while remaining far behind the slowly moving truck; all signal lamps on the cargo stay unlit.
segments.key_changes: Visible, sustained reduction in speed over three seconds; the truck keeps rolling slowly so the gap stays large.

segments.description: The ego vehicle continues decelerating and comes to a complete stop, fully stopped by the end of this segment, a long distance behind the truck, which keeps moving slowly ahead.
segments.key_changes: Deceleration completes; the ego vehicle reaches a full stop right at the end of the segment; the truck continues onward and the gap widens.
segments.camera: Forward motion easing to fully stationary by the end.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows the road ahead with a slow flatbed truck carrying stacked, switched-off traffic signal heads moving in the same lane; the ego vehicle approaches at moderate speed. By 0:02 the ego vehicle begins to slow down while still a long distance behind the truck, all signal lamps on the cargo remaining completely unlit with no glare on any lens. From 0:02 to 0:05 the deceleration continues smoothly and progressively, the gap to the slowly moving truck remaining wide. From 0:05 to 0:08 the ego vehicle keeps braking and eases to a complete stop, becoming fully stationary right at the end of the clip, while the truck continues slowly ahead and the gap widens further.
audio_description: Ambient road noise of a moving vehicle, faint tire hum and wind, the engine note lowering steadily as the car decelerates over several seconds, and a soft settling sound as the vehicle comes to a complete stop at the end; no speech or music.
